case_title: COPY CENTRAL-705 MARKET DBA COPY CENTRAL VS PENA, ARMANDO DBA JORGENSEN PRINTING & GRAPHICS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,827.50 FILED BY COPY CENTRAL-705 MARKET DBA COPY CENTRAL AS TO DEFENDANT PENA, ARMANDO DBA JORGENSEN PRINTING & GRAPHICS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PENA, ARMANDO DBA JORGENSEN PRINTING & GRAPHICS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COPY CENTRAL-705 MARKET DBA COPY CENTRAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENA, ARMANDO DBA JORGENSEN PRINTING & GRAPHICS $2,827.50 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,882.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PENA, ARMANDO DBA JORGENSEN PRINTING & GRAPHICS HEARING SET FOR JUL-07-1999 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM JUL-07-1999 TO AUG-05-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-05-1999, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT PENA, ARMANDO DBA JORGENSEN PRINTING & GRAPHICS DEFT.PENA DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLFT TO AMEND CLAIM TO NAME PROPER DEFT; TO RESET & RESERVE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
